labels.name: test
labels.description: Test additions, fixes, or coverage work

labels.name: epic
labels.description: Parent issue grouping related implementation or research work

labels.name: work-unit
labels.description: Issue defines a scoped PR-sized work unit

labels.name: research
labels.description: Requires empirical research or evaluation before implementation

labels.name: split-from-audit
labels.description: Focused issue split out from a broader audit ticket

labels.name: split-from-broad-issue
labels.description: Focused issue split out from a broad multi-finding issue

labels.name: superseded
labels.description: Closed because newer focused issues or PR work carry the obligation

labels.name: merged-into-work-unit
labels.description: Issue was merged/absorbed into a work-unit issue

labels.name: wontfix
labels.description: This will not be worked on

labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: This issue or pull request already exists

labels.name: complexity:low
labels.description: Low drift risk: concrete, checkable, composes existing work; mistakes fail fast. Not about size.

labels.name: complexity:medium
labels.description: Moderate drift risk: real modeling/theorem judgment, partial support, some weak-QC-guarded spots.

labels.name: complexity:high
labels.description: High drift risk: establishes downstream work, weakly QC-guarded, high reinvention. Not about size.
